capabilities.name: Doc page CRUD
capabilities.verify: docs_search is read-only; DocsAdminPage.tsx only syncs from GitHub (useSyncDocs)
capabilities.notes: Content is authored in the GitHub repo, not in-app; no CRUD skill or editor.

capabilities.name: Structured navigation/TOC
capabilities.verify: docs_search category browse param; DocsSidebar.tsx category tree on DocsLandingPage.tsx

capabilities.name: Search
capabilities.verify: docs_search skill (scope both); search input in DocsSidebar.tsx

capabilities.name: Public/private visibility
capabilities.verify: no visibility/is_published flag for docs pages; all synced docs are public

capabilities.name: Versioning
capabilities.verify: no in-app version history; history lives only in upstream git
